## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Local-first review

- [ ] No analytics, telemetry, auth, or required backend added.
- [ ] localStorage or future IndexedDB migration behavior considered.
- [ ] Import/export behavior tested in-browser.

## Screenshots

Add desktop and mobile screenshots for visible UI changes.
